title: Tamil Nadu Polls: Vijay Flags Voters Stranded at Bus Terminals, Urges ECI to Extend Polling by 2 Hours
description: Writing to Chief Election Commissioner (CEC) Gyanesh Kumar, Vijay alleged an intentional misplanning by Tamil Nadu State Transport Corporation, calling it an assault on the fundamental right to vote and also flagged a delay in the polling process at several polling booths.
